1509400022.english: You're late! Rhode, hurry up and get ready! It's time to sortie! Poseidon's unit will now charge into the heart of the battlefield and wipe out the enemy!
1509400022.korean: 늦었구나! 로데, 어서 준비해라 출전이다!&n포세이돈 부대는 이제부터 전장 한 가운데 들어가 적들을 쓸어버린다!

1509400031.english: Rhode? What are you doing? Why aren't you getting ready to compete?
1509400031.korean: 로데? 뭘 하고 있죠? 어서 출전 준비를 하지 않고?

1594000020.english: Oh, that's quite good, Alcyone! I'll ask Sowan to filet the fish for me!
1594000020.korean: 오오, 제법이구나 알키오네! 소완한테 부탁해서 회를 떠달라 하면 되겠구나!

1597000052.english: (Don't worry, Commander. Please look forward to my performance, honed by Goltarion's special training in acting.
1597000052.korean: (걱정마십시오, 사령관. 골타리온의 연기 특훈으로 다져진 저의 활약을 기대해주십시오.)

1597000063.english: (Goltarion said that the best acting is method acting. Please watch over me, Commander.
1597000063.korean: (골타리온이 말하길, 연기의 최고는 메소드 연기라 했습니다. 절 지켜봐 주십시오, 사령관님.)

1600819001.english: Commander, Commander! I've finally figured out the answer to Haka's Lost Technology!
1600819001.korean: 사령관님, 사령관님! 하카의 로스트 테크놀로지에 대한 해답을 드디어 알아냈어요!

1600819004.english: - Since there may be situations where Doom Bringers and Sky Knights need to be deployed deep inland, there is also a need for a long-distance air hub to replace Orca's launch pod.
1600819004.korean: - 내륙 깊숙한 곳까지 둠 브링어와 스카이나이츠가 출진해야 할 상황이 발생할 수도 있기에,&n오르카의 사출포드를 대신할 장거리 항공 허브의 필요성도 있다.

1600819007.english: Since it requires special Black River parts, mass production is obviously impossible... but we can fix the remaining parts as much as possible and redesign it to have close performance, you know?!
1600819007.korean: 블랙리버 특수 부품이 들어가야 해서, 양산은 당연히 불가능하거든...&n하지만 남은 부품들을 최대한 고쳐서 근접한 성능으로 재설계를 할 수 있긴 하거든?!

1600819009.english: Other commanders also have a positive view of Haka's redesign.
1600819009.korean: 다른 지휘관 분들도 하카의 재설계에 대해 긍정적인 생각을 가지고 계시고요.

1600819010.english: If we refer to the blueprints we drew, we should be able to manufacture it in about half a year at the latest, you know?
1600819010.korean: 우리가 그린 설계도를 참고하면 못해도 반년 정도면 제작 가능할 거거든?

1600819011.english: Hehe, I think it would be a good idea to tell Sterling, who might like it the most, right away too!
1600819011.korean: 후후, 어쩌면 제일 좋아할 스털링 동생한테도 빨리 알려주는 게 좋을 것 같거든!

1600819015.english: Of course, considering the Doom Bringer unit handled transport duties before the apocalypse, isn't it only natural that Sterling should become a member of our unit?
1600819015.korean: 당연히, 멸망 전 둠 브링어 부대가 수송 업무를 전담했던 만큼&n스털링은 우리 부대원이 돼야 하는 게 당연한 거 아니겠어?

1600819018.english: - … Of course, there is plenty of room for Fafnir, who has been with us for a long time, to feel very disappointed.
1600819018.korean: - …물론 오랜 시간 함께 해왔던 파프니르가 많이 서운해할 여지가 충분하다.

1600819020.english: Hey... Sterling! You've been traveling with me all this time! So of course it makes sense for you to become an Empress Hound. Right?!
1600819020.korean: 야... 스털링! 여태껏 너는 나랑 같이 다녔었잖아! &n그러니까 당연히 엠프레시스 하운드가 되는 게 맞지. 그렇지?!

1600819021.english: You're counting your chickens before the rice cakes are even out of your reach...
1600819021.korean: 떡 줄 사람은 생각지도 않는데, 김치국부터 마시긴…

1600819022.english: I don't like rice cakes and kimchi soup!

1600819024.english: ...It doesn't matter if you assign me wherever you want, Commander. I'm grateful just for you redesigning the Haka.
1600819024.korean: ...사령관님께서 절 원하시는 어디로든 배속해 주셔도 상관없어요. &n하카를 재설계해 주시는 것만으로도 감사한걸요.

1600819026.english: Anyway, since transport was a fact, I suppose supporting the Doom Bringers is... the right thing to do, right?
1600819026.korean: 어쨌든 수송이 제 업무였던 건 팩트니까, 역시 둠 브링어 분들을 지원해 드리는 게... 맞겠죠?

1600819027.english: Eeeeeek! Th-Traitor! How many years have we been together?!
1600819027.korean: 이이이이익! 배, 배신자! 나랑 지내 온 세월이 얼마인데?!

1600819029.english: C-C-Haka is... the nest that carries my treasure... I said!
1600819029.korean: 씨이… 하, 하카는… 내 보물을 싣는 둥지…라고!

1600819030.english: … Fafnir. Did you think of loading your junk onto the rebuilt Hakaeda again?
1600819030.korean: …파프니르. 너 재건된 하카에다 또 네 잡동사니를 싣을 생각한 거야?

1600819031.english: Damn it... That wasn't the case! I even gave you pure gold specially because you're my first subordinate! ...Fine! Go live well and prosper as a Doom Bringer!
1600819031.korean: 씨이… 그건 아니었다고! 내 첫 부하라서 특별히 순금까지 줬는데!&n...그래! 둠 브링어 가서 잘 먹고 잘 살아라!

1600819034.english: It's driving me crazy in so many ways... Should I hate this, or should I understand it?
1600819034.korean: 여러모로 사람 돌게 만드네… 이걸 미워해야 하나, 이해해야 하나.

1600819041.english: The way they talk sounds a bit prickly, but they're totally tsundere...
1600819041.korean: 말투는 틱틱 거리는 것 같은데 이거 완전 츤데레…

1600819043.english: Anyway, so. What are you going to do, Commander?
1600819043.korean: 하여튼 그래서. 어떻게 할 거야 사령관?

1600819045.english: Yes, Chief Sterling. I will do my best not to disappoint you!
1600819045.korean: 네, 기관장 스털링. 실망시켜드리지 않게 열심히 하겠습니다!

1600819047.english: Hey, Fafnir! Buy me ice cream!

1600819048.english: I lost the bet, so how about snacks instead of ice cream?
1600819048.korean: 이번 내기에서 졌는데 아이스크림 말고 과자는 어때?

1600819049.english: … Is there anything you want to eat?

1600819052.english: I've been looking for you for a while. What were you doing here?

1600819054.english: Shall we talk for a moment?

1600819056.english: … Seriously. I thought you’d be happy to load your junk onto the new haka... Why are you sniffling like you’ll never see me again?
1600819056.korean: …참나. 새로 만든 하카에 네 잡동사니 실을 거라며 좋아할 줄 알았더니만... &n왜 다시 못 만날 사람처럼 훌쩍거려.

1600819057.english: It's not like I'm disappearing from Orca.

1600819058.english: Do you really… want to go as the Doom Bringer?
1600819058.korean: 정말… 둠 브링어로 가고 싶은 거야?

1600819061.english: Ugh... seriously. Why the look on your face, huh?
1600819061.korean: 하… 진짜. 왜 그 표정이야, 응?

1600819062.english: That's not it... Eeeeeeeek!! Get out of here, man!!

1600819063.english: It’s just that our affiliations have changed; it’s not like we’re cutting ties... If that’s not the point, and you’re just disappointed that you can’t fill the Haka with weird stuff again, then just give up on that already.
1600819063.korean: 소속만 달라질 뿐이지, 우리가 인연을 끊는 것도 아니잖아…&n그게 아니라 하카에 또 이상한 물건 채워넣는 걸 못해서 아쉬운 거면 빨리 포기하고.

1600819064.english: So now you're even pinching my cheek just because I belong to a completely different unit?!
1600819064.korean: 이젠 아주 다른 부대 소속이라고 볼까지 꼬집는다 이거지?!

1600819067.english: What on earth do you think I am?!
1600819067.korean: 너, 너 날 대체 뭐라고 생각하는 거야?!

1600819068.english: An ignorant fool. A naive and clueless idiot.
1600819068.korean: 무식한 바보. 순진하고 세상물정 모르는 멍청이.

1600819069.english: Give back the hairpin and earrings I gave you! Even the gift I gave you was a waste!
1600819069.korean: 내가 줬던 머리핀이랑 귀걸이 내놔! 내가 너한테 준 선물도 아까워!

1600819070.english: Still, it was fun being with you, Captain.
1600819070.korean: 그래도 함께 하는 동안 즐거웠던 대장.

1600819071.english: Captain? Did you just say Captain?

1600819075.english: Damn it! I'm taking this for granted, really give that back! Repaying kindness with hostility?!
1600819075.korean: 씨이! 안 되겠어, 그거 진짜 내놔! 은혜를 원수로 갚아?!

1600819076.english: I don't want to. You said it was the first treasure you ever bestowed upon someone else, so why are you asking me to give it back?
1600819076.korean: 싫은데. 네가 처음으로 타인에게 하사한 보물이라면서 왜 다시 내놓으라 그래?

1600819077.english: Hmph, you said you weren't interested in gold, but look like you're coveting it now?
1600819077.korean: 흥, 황금에 관심 없다더니, 이제 와 탐나기라도 하나 보네?

1600819079.english: Yeah, I guess I did get a little greedy. Maybe it's because you gave it to me.
1600819079.korean: 그래, 나도 욕심이 좀 생기긴 했나 보다. 네가 준 거라서 그런 걸지도 모르겠네.

1600819081.english: … Ha, stop worrying for nothing. You go and do your job properly.

1600819084.english: And you can have that. No matter how much I like gold, I wouldn't give it to a subordinate and then take it back.
1600819084.korean: 그리고 그거 너 가져. 아무리 황금이 좋대도 부하한테 줬다 뺏는 짓은 안 하니까.

1600819086.english: Captain! It's obviously a trap, so how could you touch it?!
1600819086.korean: 대장! 누가 봐도 함정인데, 그걸 만지면 어떡해요?!

1600819088.english: Can't you see the giant AGS over there?! It looks like it's going to turn into dried squid...
1600819088.korean: 저기 지금 거대 AGS 안 보여요?! 쥐포 되게 생겼…

1600819091.english: Take this. It looks like some kind of jewelry.
1600819091.korean: 너 이거 가져. 무슨 장신구 같은데.

1600819092.english: ...Didn't you say you liked gold? You're not the boss right now, are you? You're a ghost, right?
1600819092.korean: ...황금 좋아한다 하지 않았어요? 지금 대장 아니죠? 귀신이죠?

1600819093.english: Think of it as a free gift for a subordinate. It's pure gold, but I gave it to you specially. Got it?
1600819093.korean: 부하한테 주는 사은품이다~ 생각하라고. 순금이지만 너한테 특별히 준 거야. 알았어?

1600819094.english: You should call it a gift... Captain.

1600819095.english: ...It's just plating, so why are you acting like you're doing me a favor?

1600819096.english: Sterling, what did you talk about with Fafnir?

1600819098.english: Hey, Sterling, your nose's all red. You're not crying, are you?
1600819098.korean: 에이~ 스털링 코 빨개졌는데? 설마 우는 거야?

1600819099.english: It didn't turn red. And I didn't cry.

1600819100.english: You used to tease me all the time calling me a fool, but you've grown fond of Fafnir, haven't you? You're such a total tsundere...
1600819100.korean: 바보라고 맨날 놀리더니, 파프니르한테 정 생겨서 그렇지? 이거 완전 츤데레…

1600819102.english: I guess I… caught the stupidity disease from Fafnir too.
1600819102.korean: 파프니르한테서 나도… 바보 병이 옮았나 보네.

1600819105.english: So you're saying the technology can be reproduced almost perfectly? Is mass production… impossible?
1600819105.korean: 기술은 거의 완벽하게 재현할 수 있단 거지? 양산은… 불가능한가?

1600819107.english: How's the estimated redesign time, Fortune?

1600819108.english: Okay, I'll leave it to you.

1600819111.english: You guys are closer to special forces... you aren't transport specialists.
1600819111.korean: 너흰 특작부대에 가깝지… 수송 전문은 아니잖아.

1600819115.english: I look forward to seeing you play a big role in Doom Bringer.

1600820001.english: I am Sterling, transferred to the position of Doom Bringer as of today. Please welcome me with applause.
1600820001.korean: 오늘 부로 둠 브링어로 인사이동이 된 스털링입니다. 박수로 맞이해주세요.

1600820002.english: Nice to meet you all, and I look forward to working with you.

1600820004.english: Huh? Where do you mean it's big?

1600820005.english: Of course, you must be talking about 'that side'. Sylphid.

1600820006.english: … Haha. Th-that… I guess it would be better to be a bit agile like the Doom Bringers, right? The Orca food is delicious, so I ate a lot… I wonder if I should lose some weight.
1600820006.korean: …하하. 그, 그게… 역시 둠 브링어 분들처럼 좀 날렵한 게 좋겠죠?&n오르카 밥이 맛있어서 많이 먹는 바람에… 체중 감량을 좀 하는게 좋으려나.

1600820008.korean: 다들 여기 있었어? 흐음~ 환영해, 스털링.

1600820010.english: I told everyone to get along well.

1600820011.english: Honestly… it would be a lie to say I wasn’t worried about whether my physique would suit the Doom Bringers, but I am truly grateful for the warm welcome.
1600820011.korean: 솔직히… 둠 브링어 분들한테 제가 과연 어울리는 체형일까 고민이 되지 않았다면 거짓말이겠지만, 이렇게 환영해 주신다니 정말 감사합니다.

1600820012.english: … What is a suitable body type?

1600820013.english: … I thought it was just slender people like Night Angel gathered here. I’ve been getting PT from Mighty lately just in case I ever need to wear flight gear…
1600820013.korean: …저는 나이트 앤젤 님처럼 슬랜더한 분들만 모여 계신 줄 알았거든요.&n혹시라도 비행 장비를 착용할 일이 올까 해서, 요즘 마이티 씨한테 P.T 받는 중이었는데…

1600820014.english: It's okay! I fly around just fine, too!

1600820015.english: … Didn't I tell you to lose weight yesterday as well?

1600820016.english: Hmph... You didn't say a word to Strato Angel...
1600820016.korean: 히잉… 스트라토 엔젤 님한텐 아무런 말씀도 안 하셨으면서…

1600820017.english: While I'm at it, I hope Strato Angel goes on a diet again.
1600820017.korean: 내친 김에 스트라토 엔젤도 다시 다이어트를 했으면 좋겠습니다.

1600820018.english: Ah, I plan to take it out myself. Don't worry!
1600820018.korean: 아, 알아서 뺄 생각이에요. 걱정하지 마세요!

1600820019.korean: 나이트 앤젤… 직장 내 괴롭힘은 안 돼요.

1600820020.english: That's right. What can I do? Orca's food is delicious.
1600820020.korean: 맞아요. 오르카의 음식들이 맛있는 걸 어떡해요.

1600820021.english: I've also been eating a lot lately because it's really delicious...
1600820021.korean: 저도 요새… 정말 맛있어서 많이 먹다 보니…

1600820022.english: While we're at it, Mr. Sterling, would you like to drop by the gourmet gathering? We'll be able to sample Ms. Sowan's special Schweinshaxe this week...
1600820022.korean: 이참에 스털링 씨도 미식회에 한 번 놀러 오시겠어요?&n이번 주는 소완 씨의 특제 슈바인스학세를 시식해 볼 수 있을 텐데…

1600820023.english: I think Mr. Mighty is going to scold me... Haha...
1600820023.korean: 마이티 씨가 혼내실 것 같은데… 하하…

1600820024.english: Don't worry. Just exercise to lose the weight you ate.
1600820024.korean: 걱정마라. 먹은 만큼 운동을 해서 빼면 그만이다.

1600820029.english: Well, anyway, the introductions are over... How about it, Sterling?
1600820029.korean: 자, 어쨌든 대원들 소개는 끝났고… 어때 스털링?

1600820031.english: It’s called the military, but actually, it’s nothing special. You just have to do your assigned work hard.
1600820031.korean: 말만 군대이지, 사실 별 건 없어. 맡은 일만 열심히 하면 돼.

1600820032.english: I look forward to working with you. Sterling.

1600820033.english: Anyway, considering how worried I was, it's going better than I thought.
1600820033.korean: 그나저나, 걱정됐던 것치곤 생각보다 잘 넘어가네?

1600820034.english: What are you worried about, Captain?

1600820035.english: I was worried that the adjutant might show hostility after seeing Sterling's physique.
1600820035.korean: 난 혹시나 스털링 몸매를 보고 부관이 텃세를 놓지 않을까 염려했는데.

1600820036.english: Do you think I would do that? I'm not a one or two-year-old child.
1600820036.korean: 제가 한 두 살 먹은 어린 애도 아니고 그러겠습니까?

1600820039.english: Why is that story coming up there?

1600820040.english: I didn't mean to be sarcastic, Deputy. I'm just saying it because I like how bright your expression looks compared to before.
1600820040.korean: 비꼬려고 말한 건 아냐 부관. 난 그저 예전보다 밝아진 부관 표정이 좋아 보여 말하는 건데?

1600820042.english: Thanks to the Captain, things have gotten brighter than before. I used to get so frustrated every time I saw her on the verge of tears because she couldn't even go on a date with the Commander.
1600820042.korean: 대장 덕분에 예전보단 밝아지긴 했죠. &n사령관과 데이트 한 번 못해서 울먹거리는 모습을 볼 때마다 울화통이 터졌거든요.

1600820043.english: What? A date…? I heard rumors that Captain May has the Commander under her thumb every night.
1600820043.korean: 네? 데이트… 요? 메이 대장님께선 사령관을 밤마다 휘어잡는단 소문을 들었는데.

1600820044.english: Ha... You mean to take control? It reminds me of the time when I couldn't even properly utilize that lewd lump of fat, just stammering, sniffling, and drinking.
1600820044.korean: 하… 휘어 잡는다고요? 그 음탕한 지방덩어리를 제대로 활용도 못하고 &n어버버거리다 훌쩍거리며 술만 마시던 때가 떠오르군요.

1600820047.english: M-Did you say that, Lieutenant?! What do you mean by a younger brother!
1600820047.korean: 마, 말 다했어 부관?! 어린 동생이라니 그게 무슨 말이야!

1600820048.english: Huh? Wait a minute... Why are you suddenly... each other

1600820049.english: I understand. Even small peppers can be quite spicy, can't they?
1600820049.korean: 이해하겠습니다. 작은 고추도 꽤 매운 법이지 않습니까?

1600820050.english: Huh? Lieutenant. Aren't you the one who's small? No, wait. You must be a small raisin.
1600820050.korean: 하? 부관. 너야말로 작은 고추 아닌가? 아니지. 작은 건포도겠지.

1600820051.english: A new recruit has arrived, so are you suggesting we start a war of revelations? Your virtue is as small as your height.
1600820051.korean: 신입도 왔는데 폭로전이라도 하잔 말씀입니까? &n그 키만큼이나 덕이 작으시군요.

1600820052.english: Fine. I’ll make sure to clearly show you that your speed is as pathetic as the size of your chest.
1600820052.korean: 좋아. 그 가슴 크기 만큼 부관의 속도 졸렬하다는 걸 똑똑히 알려주도록 하지.

1600820053.english: Ha, Sterling. Between Captain May and me, who looks smaller? I mean our overall physiques.
1600820053.korean: 하, 스털링. 메이 대장과 저 중에 누가 더 작아보이시죠? 전체적인 체형 말입니다.

1600820054.english: Answer whatever comes to mind. I'll cover for the lieutenant's grudges.
1600820054.korean: 마음 가는대로 대답해 봐. 부관의 뒤끝은 내가 커버해줄 테니까.

1600820056.english: It's an annual event, Sterling. Just let it be.
1600820056.korean: 연례 행사에요 스털링. 그냥 그러려니 하세요.

1600820058.english: I look forward to working with you, Mr. Sterling.

1600820059.english: *Mumble mumble*... Nice to meet you, Mr. Sterling!

1600820060.english: I'm counting on you, super cool tomboy sister!
1600820060.korean: 잘 부탁한다고요, 초 멋진 톰보이 언니!

1600820063.english: … Haha, yes, I look forward to working with you.

1600821001.english: Are the blueprints for Haka Unit 2 really complete?

1600821002.english: Our technical team worked really hard on this, so I'd like to ask for your feedback.
1600821002.korean: 우리 기술부원들이 열심히 매달려서 만든 건데 어떤지 평가 좀 부탁하거든?

1600821003.english: Six combined fusion reactors... Of course, since they are installed as backups, it is sufficient even without as many as eight like before, but...
1600821003.korean: 복합핵융합로가 6개라… 물론 보조로 달아둔 거라 예전처럼 8개 씩이나 없어도 충분 하지만…

1600821004.english: That's a good point, Sterling. I anticipated that, so I had a special auxiliary power source in place.
1600821004.korean: 좋은 지적이에요 스털링 님. 그럴 줄 알고 특별한 보조 동력원을 구상해 놓았죠.

1600821006.english: We designed a system using Fafnir's power as an auxiliary generator to maintain an operating rate of at least 50% even in the event of damage to the fusion reactor.
1600821006.korean: 파프니르 님의 전력을 이용한 보조 발전기로, 핵융합로 파손 시에도&n최소 50% 이상의 가동률을 유지할 수 있도록 시스템을 구상해놓았죠.

1600821007.english: … Now there is no reason for Fafnir to ride the Haka.

1600821009.english: I told you I'm not riding it. No matter how stupid Fafnir is, using Haka as a backup battery is non-human... no, non-bioroid. And what is this?
1600821009.korean: 글쎄 안 탄다니까요. 아무리 파프니르가 바보여도 하카의 보조 배터리로 쓰는 건 &n비인간… 아니, 비바이오로이드적이잖아요. 그리고 이건 뭐죠?

1600821010.english: It's the self-destruct device Azaz asked me to make.

1600821011.english: What did you say...? Is there a reason to install a self-destruct device?
1600821011.korean: 뭐라고요…? 자폭 장치를 달 이유가 있어요?

1600821012.english: Let me explain. A situation where you would self-destruct the Haka would be a very critical situation where the Haka is in danger of falling into enemy hands, or has already fallen.
1600821012.korean: 제가 설명하죠. 하카를 자폭시킬 상황이란 건, 적에게 하카가 넘어갈 위기에 처했거나 혹은 이미 넘어간 아주 위급한 상황이겠죠.

1600821013.english: I mean, then you can just destroy it by crashing into it... Is there really no need to go out of your way to make a self-destruct device?
1600821013.korean: 아니 그러면 충돌시켜 파괴하면 되지… 굳이 자폭 장치를 만들 필요까진 없지 않나요?

1600821014.english: Rather than crashing unstylishly, burning up under your own power with spectacular flames, and walking forward steadfastly and 멋있게 with that as a backdrop, as if you have no lingering regrets—isn't that exactly the Chief Engineer's unspoken dream?
1600821014.korean: 이왕 멋없이 충돌하는 것보단, 화려한 불꽃과 함께 자력으로 타오르고, &n그걸 배경으로 미련은 없는 것처럼 꿋꿋하고 멋있게 걸어나가는 것이야말로 기관장의 말 못 할 로망이잖아요.

1600821015.english: … Why are you specifically thinking of making them self-destruct first?
1600821015.korean: …왜 굳이 자폭시키는 걸 먼저 생각하고 계시죠?

1600821016.english: Now that the Haka has been successfully restored, isn't there no reason not to include a self-destruct function?
1600821016.korean: 하카 복원에 성공한 지금, 자폭 기능을 넣지 말아야 할 이유는 없지 않나요?

1600821017.english: On top of that… the self-destruct device is connected to the composite fusion reactor…?
1600821017.korean: 게다가… 자폭 장치가 복합핵융합로에 연결이 돼있네요…?

1600821018.english: Rather than making a separate self-destruct device... it's better to just connect the nuclear fusion reactor. It's less of a hassle to build... and the destructive power will be much greater.
1600821018.korean: 자폭 장치를 따로 만들기보단... 핵 융합로를 연결시켜버리는 게 낫잖아. &n만들 때 덜 귀찮고… 파괴력도 훨씬 셀 거야.

1600821021.english: Sterling, trust Orca's technology. By the way... you need to know the most important thing, okay? This is a high-tech device we invented, called 'LAKA'!
1600821021.korean: 스털링 동생, 오르카의 기술력을 믿어 봐. &n그나저나… 가장 중요한 걸 알아야 하거든?  이건 우리들이 발명한 첨단 기기, 일명 'L.A.K.A'라는 거거든!

1600821022.english: Laka…? Isn’t it just an ordinary smartwatch?

1600821024.english: Driverless operation... The engine room is exposed to the outside, so it would be dangerous if targeted... That's nice. Of course, it would be best if the concealment remained hidden so as not to become a target, though...
1600821024.korean: 무인운전이라… 기관실 쪽이 밖으로 노출되어 있어서, 노려지면 위험한데... 좋네요.&n물론 표적이 되지 않도록 은신이 노출되지 않는 게 베스트이지만...

1600821025.english: This was Azaz's idea, and since it seemed like a better feature than expected, Gremlin and I put quite a bit of effort into it, you know?
1600821025.korean: 이건 아자즈 님 의견이었는데, 생각보다 괜찮은 기능 같아서 그렘린이랑 이 언니가 공 좀 들였거든?

1600821026.english: Holding the steering wheel with your own hands is nice, but... this aspect isn't bad either.
1600821026.korean: 직접 손으로 타륜을 잡는 것도 좋지만… 이런 부분도 나쁘지 않네요.

1600821027.english: Unfortunately, redesigning it to 100% perfect specifications was nearly impossible. However, it will function perfectly for transport purposes, as an air hub, and for fire support and refueling.
1600821027.korean: 100% 완벽한 스펙으로 재설계하는 건 아쉽지만 불가능에 가까웠어요.&n하지만 수송 목적이나, 항공 허브, 화력 지원과 급유 면에 있어선 완벽하게 재기능을 할 거예요.

1600821028.english: … I’m also planning to build a drone that can self-repair most damage. After all, it’s a hassle to repair this giant airship whenever I have a spare moment…
1600821028.korean: …웬만한 손상은 자가 수복해주는 드론도 같이 만들 계획이야.&n이 거대한 비행선을 틈날 때마다 수리해주는 것도 귀찮으니까…

1600821030.english: Huh? Mr. Sterling… why are you suddenly so quiet?
1600821030.korean: 응? 스털링 씨… 갑자기 왜 아무 말이 없으세요?

1600821032.english: Could it be... that it's because the performance is slightly lower than the 1st generation Haka?
1600821032.korean: 혹시… 1세대 하카보다 다소 성능이 낮아서 그러신 건가요?

1600821033.english: No... I'm just saying this because I'm grateful.

1600821034.english: I know better than anyone because I've driven a Haka. She was really… amazing. You probably won't be able to make one with the exact same specs.
1600821034.korean: 제가 하카를 운전해봐서 누구보다도 잘 알아요. 그녀는 정말… 대단했죠.&n그것과 똑같은 스펙으론 만들 수 없을 거예요.

1600821035.english: If I can soar like before and fulfill the role given to me... that is enough.
1600821035.korean: 예전처럼 날아오를 수 있고, 제게 주어진 역할을 수행할 수 있다면... 그걸로 족해요.

1600821037.english: About this blueprint... could you show it to me again? It's not perfect, but I want to be of as much help to you as I can within my knowledge.
1600821037.korean: 이 설계도 말이죠… 저한테 다시 보여주실래요? 미숙하지만 제가 아는 선에선 최대한 여러분께 도움이 되고 싶어요.

1600821038.english: Alright! Little Sterling~ This older sister is fired up for the first time in a while... I'm going to show you that Orca's technology is just as good as Black River's, you know?!
1600821038.korean: 좋아! 스털링 동생~ 이 언니도 간만에 불타오르네...&n오르카 기술력이 블랙리버 만큼 뛰어나다는 걸 보여 줄 거거든?!

1600821039.english: Okay, let's try making it properly this time.
1600821039.korean: 좋아요, 이번엔 제대로 한 번 만들어 보도록 하죠.

1600821043.english: Sisters, how is the Haka redesign going?

1600821046.english: Yeah. That's a relief. Thanks to you, we were able to recreate most of the performances Haka had done. And I'm sure the Commander won't be disappointed at all.
1600821046.korean: 응. 다행이야. 덕분에 하카가 했던 대부분의 퍼포먼스를 되살릴 수 있었어.&n사령관님께서도 절대로 실망하지 않으실 거라고.

1600821047.english: But... maybe because the budget is a bit high... I'm worried about this and that. I'm also concerned about what to do if the performance doesn't meet the Commander's standards...
1600821047.korean: 근데… 예산이 좀 많이 들어가서 그런가… 이래저래 걱정이 되네.&n혹시라도 사령관님 눈높이에 맞지 않은 성능을 내면 어떡하나 걱정도 되고…

1600821048.english: If mass production is impossible… then there would naturally be many more things to consider, right? Like increasing the size of the ballast room… or choosing to reduce the passenger cabin and increase cargo capacity…
1600821048.korean: 양산이 불가능하다면… 역시 여러 가지로 더 고려 해야 할 것들이 많겠지?&n밸러스트룸 크기를 더 키운다거나… 객실을 줄이고 적재량을 늘리는 선택을 한다거나…

1600821049.english: Sister, why do you think your brother told you to make the Haka again?
1600821049.korean: 언니, 언니는 오빠가 왜 하카를 다시 만들라고 한 것 같아?

1600821050.english: Huh? Well… wouldn't they obviously have rebuilt the Haka to allow the Orca Resistance to be effectively deployed in Operation &n?
1600821050.korean: 응? 그거야… 당연히 오르카 저항군이 효과적으로 &n작전에 투입될 수 있게끔 하려고 하카를 재건한 게 아닐까?

1600821051.english: Come on~ We've been winning just fine so far with only command skills, without an airship like that! Do you really not understand why I went out of my way to invest the budget to build it?
1600821051.korean: 에이~ 그런 비행선 없이 지휘 능력만으로도 여태껏 잘만 승리했어!&n굳이 오빠가 예산을 투입해서 만든 이유를 정말 모르겠어?

1600821052.english: You know they say that when the first Haka was built at Black River, it involved advanced technology and a massive budget. Even if they have stockpiled a huge amount of supplies, do you really not have any idea why they went out of their way to proceed with a project that might actually be detrimental in a wartime situation like this?
1600821052.korean: 초대 하카도 블랙리버에서 만들어질 때 진보적인 기술력과 엄청난 예산이 들어갔다고 하잖아.&n아무리 많은 물자를 저장해놓았다고 해도 이런 전시 상황에 독이 될지 모를 프로젝트를 굳이 진행한 이유에 대해서 정말 짚이는 게 없어?

1600821055.english: If only to repay the debt he owed to my sisters and Haka... my brother wanted to make Haka again. He even promised to make it himself, and he complained to my sisters that he couldn't put it off any longer.
1600821055.korean: 언니랑 하카한테 진 빚을 갚기 위해서라도… 오빠는 하카를 다시 만들어 주고 싶어 했어.&n오빠가 직접 만들어준다고 약속까지 했는데, 더는 미룰 수 없다고 언니들한테 하소연했거든.

1600821056.english: You really are redesigning it for that reason… because of the promise made back then?
1600821056.korean: 굳이, 그런 이유로… 재설계를 한다고? 그때 했던 약속 때문에?

1600821057.english: It looks like Sterling still doesn't know Oppa~ Isn't it time you got used to him? Oppa always thinks of our Orca's happiness first!
1600821057.korean: 스털링 언니는 아직도 오빠를 모르나 보네~ 이젠 적응할 때도 되지 않았어?&n오빠는 늘 우리 오르카의 행복을 먼저 생각하잖아!

1600821058.english: If that was really the reason… even if it takes time, make it more perfect…
1600821058.korean: 정말 그런 이유였다면… 시간이 들더라도 더 완벽하게…

1600821059.english: Of course, it would be best to restore it perfectly. That is something we can fill in gradually through upgrades.
1600821059.korean: 물론 완벽하게 복원하는 게 좋겠지. &n그거야 차차 업그레이드를 통해 채워나가면 될 일이고~

1600821062.english: My little doctor isn't wrong about a single thing, you know? And with all of us sticking close like this, there's no way the Commander would be disappointed, you know?
1600821062.korean: 우리 닥터 동생 말 틀린 거 하나 없거든? &n그리고 우리들 모두가 이렇게 달라붙었는데 사령관이 실망할 리도 없거든?

1600821064.english: … Ahaha, I guess I acted a bit awkward for no reason. I thought the former Commander promised the redesign simply because he wanted to deploy the Haka strategically...
1600821064.korean: …아하하, 괜히, 제가 멋쩍게 군 것 같네요. &n전 사령관님이 그저, 하카를 전략적으로 투입하고 싶어 재설계를 약속하신 거라 생각했는데...

1600821066.english: By the way, the blueprints you're refining looked amazing... By any chance, would you be interested in joining me to gain a broader understanding and explore aerospace engineering, using the knowledge you have?
1600821066.korean: 그나저나 언니가 보완 중인 설계도 보니까 대단하던데…&n혹시, 가지고 있는 지식을 바탕으로 우주항공 공학에 대한 더 폭넓은 이해와 탐구를 나와 함께 해볼 생각은 없어?

1600821067.english: I was actually in need of people to help with my research these days!
1600821067.korean: 안 그래도 요즘 연구를 도와줄 인원이 필요했는데!

1600821069.english: Oh my, look, it looks like Sterling's younger brother's friends have come to visit.
1600821069.korean: 어머, 저기 스털링 동생 친구들이 찾아온 것 같거든?

1600821070.english: I was wondering what you've been up to lately since you haven't been hanging out with us... so you were doing something like this?
1600821070.korean: 요새 우리랑 놀지도 않고 뭐하나 봤는데… 이런 거 하고 있던 거야?

1600821073.english: We've tried moving the Haka with Sterling too, so we can help somehow!
1600821073.korean: 우리도 스털링이랑 같이 하카를 움직여 봤으니까 어떻게든 도와줄 수 있다고!

1600821074.english: It’s not that we don’t miss the Haka, Sterling.
1600821074.korean: 우리라고 하카를 그리워하지 않는 건 아니야, 스털링.

1600821076.english: Everyone is working so hard to see Sterling's little brother fly again, you know?
1600821076.korean: 스털링 동생이 다시 하늘을 나는 모습을 보려고 이렇게 모두들 노력하고 있거든?

1600821077.english: I thought you guys were mindless...
1600821077.korean: 너희들 아무 생각 없는 줄 알았더니…

1600821078.english: Don't treat us like we're on the same level as Fafnir!

1600821079.english: Seriously, why are you doing this? It's making me cry!

1600821080.english: What are you talking about when you're already crying!

1600821083.english: … You guys would better be prepared. I'm going to make you work hard without any breaks!
1600821083.korean: …너희들 각오하는 게 좋을 거야. 쉬는 시간 없이 빡세게 일 시킬 거니까!

1600822005.english: My heart was pounding... so I couldn't fall asleep.

1600822007.english: Uh, well... I've practically been living in the hangar... so I'll go wash up.
1600822007.korean: 그, 그게... 격납고에서 살다시피 해서… 씻고 오겠습니다.

1600822009.english: Commander, have I perhaps mentioned this to you?
1600822009.korean: 사령관님, 혹시 제가 말씀드린 적 있나요?

1600822010.english: Back when humans were still around, I watched right beside the scene as the first Haka was completed.
1600822010.korean: 전 인간님들이 계셨을 당시에, 초대 하카가 완성되는 모습을 바로 옆에서 지켜봤었다고요.

1600822011.english: Maybe it's because I saw the Director and the researchers pouring their hearts and souls into the production... but it feels very moving. I wish I could have burned it for you in person.
1600822011.korean: 연구소장님과 연구원분들이 기를 쓰고 영혼을 불살라 제작에 매달리는 걸 봐서 그런 지… 감회가 새로워요.&n…직접 태워드릴 수 있었더라면 좋았을 텐데.

1600822013.english: Huh? Ah... hahaha... well... I mean...

1600822014.english: It's good that I joined Orca. But…

1600822015.english: The best thing is that I have something to do inside the Orca.
1600822015.korean: 제가 오르카 안에서 할 일이 생겼다는 게 제일 좋아요.

1600822016.english: It seems Fafnir has played a significant role so far... and I've often felt a deep sense of regret, wondering what it would have been like if Haka had also played a proper role at least once in the operations the Commander has planned.
1600822016.korean: 그간 파프니르도 크게 한 건 활약한 모양이고… 여태 사령관님이 계획한 작전에서 하카도 한 번쯤 제대로 활약했었더라면 어땠을까 하고… &n내심 아쉬운 적이 많았거든요.

1600822018.english: What? What do you mean, Commander? I… I was just a bioroid originally designed to pilot the Haka…
1600822018.korean: 네? 그게 무슨 말씀이세요 사령관님?&n전… 원래부터 하카를 몰기 위해 설계된 바이오로이드였을 뿐인데…

1600822020.english: What do you mean... that's embarrassing...

1600822022.english: Haha... ha... Is, is that so?

1600822023.english: Captain May treats me really well. And Night Angel too…
1600822023.korean: 메이 대장님께서 정말 잘 대해주세요. 그리고 나이트 앤젤 님도…

1600822028.english: I think that would be difficult to handle in its own way...
1600822028.korean: 그건 그것대로 감당하기 힘들 것 같은데요…

1600822029.english: By the way, Commander. From what I’ve heard from others… is it really true that you’ve engaged in various eccentric behaviors?
1600822029.korean: 그나저나 사령관님. 다른 분들께 이야기를 듣기론… 여러 기행을 벌이셨다는 게 정말 사실이세요?

1600822030.english: Like the Orca Cooking Contest... or the Reverse Bunny Show... or being the Honorary President of the SM Club. And lately, they've been saying they'll give the AGS members a chance to date...
1600822030.korean: 오르카 요리 대회라던가… 역바니 쇼라던가… SM 클럽 명예 회장님이시라던가. &n요샌 AGS 분들께 연애의 기회를 드리겠다면서...

1600822033.english: You don't really need to hide it. After all, you are the last human. Even when I was traveling with Fafnir before joining, I went through a lot of bizarre things... so now I won't even be surprised by ordinary things.
1600822033.korean: 딱히 숨기지 않으셔도 됩니다. 어차피 마지막 인간님이시잖아요.&n합류 전, 파프니르랑 다닐 때도 기상천외한 일을 많이 겪어봐서… 이제 웬만한 일엔 놀라지도 않을 거예요.

1600822036.english: I heard that the children under Fafnir and me were also transferred to the Haka crew.
1600822036.korean: 저랑 파프니르의 휘하에 있던 아이들도 하카 승조원으로 인사이동 시켜주셨다면서요.

1600822038.english: The kids probably didn't show it all this time, but they must have wanted to ride the haka again more than anyone else.
1600822038.korean: 그동안 애들이 내색하지 않았겠지만, 분명 누구보다도 하카를 다시 타고 싶었을 거예요.

1600822039.english: I made a lot of fun memories while adventuring here and there with Haka.
1600822039.korean: 하카로 이곳저곳을 모험하면서 재밌는 추억들을 많이 만들었죠.

1600822040.english: Yes, I think so... Oh, but Commander?
1600822040.korean: 네, 아마 그럴 것 같아요… 아, 그런데 사령관님?

1600822041.english: By any chance… have you ever actually gone up to a high altitude?
1600822041.korean: 혹시… 높은 고도에 직접 올라가 보신 적은 있으신가요?

1600822045.english: Then… Commander, if we end up holding the vacuum ceremony, would it be alright to postpone the time to the evening?
1600822045.korean: 그러면… 사령관님. 혹시, 진공식을 하게 되거든 시간대를 저녁으로 미뤄도 될까요?

1600822046.english: Commander... I would like to give you a gift as well.
1600822046.korean: 사령관님께… 저도 선물 하나를 드리고 싶어서요.

1600822049.english: Actually, it's strange that you're not sleeping.
1600822049.korean: 오히려 네가 안 자고 있는게 신기한데.

1600822052.english: No. Shall we walk a little, Sterling?

1600822054.english: I suppose if you can memorize Haka's specs by heart...
1600822054.korean: 하긴, 하카의 스펙을 달달 외울 정도면…

1600822055.english: I've never seen Sterling this happy.
1600822055.korean: 스털링이 이렇게 기뻐하는 걸 본 적이 없네.

1600822056.english: As far as I can remember, that is the brightest smile I’ve seen you with since you came to Orca.
1600822056.korean: 내 기억 상 오르카에 온 이후로 본 모습 중에 가장 밝게 웃는 얼굴을 하고 있는걸.

1600822057.english: I don't think Sterling exists solely for the Haka.
1600822057.korean: 난 꼭 스털링이 하카를 위해서만 존재한다고는 생각 안 해.

1600822060.english: We can remake the Haka, but...

1600822061.english: There is only one Sterling this passionate.

1600822062.english: It feels like things have gotten brighter since Orca came.

1600822063.english: Do you treat the Doom Bringer kids well?

1600822064.english: Should I switch you to Empressis Hound?

1600822067.english: I don't know anyone like that.

1600822072.english: Hmm... I've flown for a short while... but I've never been up to a high place.
1600822072.korean: 음… 잠깐 비행한 적은 있어도… 높은 곳을 올라간 적은 없지.

1600822073.english: Huh, why specifically in the evening?

1600823002.english: [c][00FF00][I've finished opening the hangar roof too, you know?][-][/c]

1600823003.english: [c][00FF00][The amount of energy flowing in the combined fusion reactor is also stable.][-][/c]

1600823004.english: [c][00FF00][… Everything is ready. Go ahead and depart.][-][/c]

1600823006.english: [c][00FF00][Don't worry! Do you think I can't handle something like this properly?][-][/c]
1600823006.korean: [c][00FF00][걱정 말라고! 이런 거 하나 내가 제대로 못 하겠어?][-][/c]

1600823007.english: [c][00FF00][… Captain. You aren't throwing champagne in a strange place because you lack strength or are too short, are you?][-][/c]
1600823007.korean: [c][00FF00][…대장. 혹시 힘이 부족하거나 키가 너무 낮아서 &n이상한데 샴페인을 던지는 건 아니겠죠?][-][/c]

1600823008.english: [c][00FF00][It is said to be ominous if champagne is hit properly and does not break.][-][/c]
1600823008.korean: [c][00FF00][샴페인이 제대로 맞아 깨지지 않으면 불길하다고 합니다.][-][/c]

1600823009.english: [c][00FF00][Lieutenant! Why are you bringing up the Key there?! If all else fails, we can just fly to the Throne and clear it!][-][/c]
1600823009.korean: [c][00FF00][부관! 거기서 키 이야기가 왜 나오는데?! 정 안 되면 옥좌로 비행해서 깨도 된다고!][-][/c]

1600823011.english: [c][00FF00][Why don't you worry about your chest first, which looks even smaller since Sterling came in?!][-][/c]
1600823011.korean: [c][00FF00][스털링이 들어오고 나서 더 작아 보이는 네 가슴부터 걱정하지 그래?!][-][/c]

1600823013.english: Switched to power sources for combined fusion reactors 1 through 4.

1600823014.english: What happened to the mooring rope?

1600823018.english: Good. Camouflage field activated. Thermal and electromagnetic stealth activated... Floating device Vector, switch to rudder...
1600823018.korean: 좋아. 은폐장 작동. 열, 전파 스텔스 작동… 부유장치 벡터, 방향타로 전환…

1600823019.english: Haka, surfacing. All crew members to position.

1600823022.english: Commander, this is the night sky of Earth that I have always seen with Fafnir... You mentioned that you had never seen the sky from a high altitude, so I really wanted to show it to you.
1600823022.korean: 사령관님, 제가 파프니르랑 늘 봐왔던… 지구의 밤하늘입니다.&n높은 고도에서 보는 하늘은 본 적 없다고 하셔서, 꼭 사령관님께 보여드리고 싶었습니다.

1600823026.english: … I really wanted to show this to the Commander.

1600823028.english: I wanted to invite the researchers who put their heads together when the Haka was first created to watch this scene with me.
1600823028.korean: 예전에 처음 하카가 만들어졌을 때, 같이 머리를 맞댔던 연구원 분들을 모시고 같이 이 장면을 보고 싶었어요.

1600823030.english: So, if the Haka were to be remade… I wanted to look at the stars with the Commander, the last human.
1600823030.korean: 그래서, 하카가 다시 만들어진다면… 마지막 인간님이신 사령관님과 함께 별을 보고 싶었습니다.

1600823031.english: Sterling, completed reaching an altitude of 20km! Further ascent…
1600823031.korean: 스털링, 고도 20KM 진입 완료했어! 더 상승…

1600823032.english: You fool, in times like this, you should just step aside.
1600823032.korean: 바보야, 이럴 땐 그냥 자리 비키고 있는 거야.

1600823034.english: Shut your mouth. Is your level of perceptiveness on the level of Fafnir?
1600823034.korean: 입 다물고 있어. 너 눈치 수준 파프니르 급이야?

1600823035.english: … Who, who said I'm crying?! Stay suspended in your current position!
1600823035.korean: …누, 누가 운다고 그래?! 현재 위치에서 정지 체공해!

1600823037.english: … It seems like everyone in Orca loves you, Commander. I think I know why now.
1600823037.korean: …오르카의 모든 분들이 사령관님을 사랑하시는 것 같은데. 왜 그런지 이제 알 것 같습니다.

1600823039.english: There was a reason why Fafnir wanted to help the Commander so much, even to the point of sacrificing Haka.
1600823039.korean: 파프니르가 그렇게나 하카를 희생하면서까지 사령관님을 돕고 싶어 했던 이유가 있었네요.

1600823040.english: Back then, I couldn't have hated that decision so much...
1600823040.korean: 그땐 그 결정이 그렇게도 미울 수가 없었는데…

1600823042.english: … I thought you said you would make the Haka again just to comfort me.
1600823042.korean: …하카를 다시 만들어주신다 하신 것도 절 위로하기 위해 그냥 하신 말씀인 줄로만 알았는데.

1600823046.english: … In a way, you are seriously kind, almost like a fool.
1600823046.korean: …정말이지 어떻게 보면 그 바보처럼 심각하게 착하시네요.

1600823049.english: That fool has a reckless side sometimes... and as a former subordinate, I thought it was something worth emulating. If the first gift was this beautiful night sky... please consider this right now as the second gift.
1600823049.korean: 그 바보한텐 가끔 저돌적인 면이 있는데… 전직 부하로서 본받아 볼 만한 점이라고 생각돼서요.&n첫 번째 선물이 이 아름다운 밤하늘이라면… 지금 이게 두 번째 선물이라고 생각하세요.

1600823050.english: … Seriously, what are we supposed to do if even the Commander is being so reckless?

1600823053.english: I came to turn off the light.

1600823056.english: Well… I’m not sure. Did Fafnir do that, or… did Captain May?
1600823056.korean: 글쎄요… 잘 모르겠어요. 파프니르가 그랬나요, 아님… 메이 대장님께서 그러셨나요?

1600823058.english: … I got permission to sleep with Captain May. Ms. Lilith let me in too… Hehe…
1600823058.korean: …메이 대장님께 동침권을 받았어요. 리리스 씨께서도 들여보내주셨고요… 헤헤…

1600823059.english: I heard… the Doom Bringer initiation ritual is spending the night with the Commander…
1600823059.korean: 듣기론… 둠 브링어 신입 신고식은 사령관님과 하룻밤을 같이 보내는 거라던데…

1600823060.english: … If you don't want to, it can't be helped. I was planning to give you a third gift.
1600823060.korean: …싫으시면 어쩔 수 없죠. 세 번째 선물을 드리려고 했는데.

1600823062.english: I might be being presumptuous, but... even if only to be compensated for all the sleepless nights I've worked...
1600823062.korean: 주제넘은 말 일지도 모르겠지만… 그간 제가 밤새워 일한 보상을 받기 위해서라도…

1600823063.english: Commander, you'll have to put in some effort.

1600823064.english: I heard that the Haka you have, Commander, is amazing. As the Chief Engineer, I don't think I can just move on without piloting it myself.
1600823064.korean: 사령관님께서 가지고 계신 하카도 대단하다고 들었는데. &n명색이 기관장인 저로서는 조종을 안 해보고는 넘어갈 수 없을 것 같네요.

1600823065.english: F*ck, let's give it a try.

1600823066.english: - Even if only to celebrate Sterling’s dream of soaring into the skies with humanity…
1600823066.korean: - 인간과 함께 창공으로 날아오르고자 했던 스털링의 꿈을 축하하기 위해서라도…

1600823071.english: No matter how you do it, I'd be grateful if you woke me up.
1600823071.korean: 뭐 어떻게 하던 간에 깨주면 고마워.

1600823077.english: Because I am the last human left to you.

1600823081.english: I think I've been influenced by Fafnir.

1600823084.english: Sterling knows who it is better than anyone, right?

1600823085.english: You seem really drunk... Why don't you stop and rest now?
1600823085.korean: 많이 취한 것 같은데… 이제 그만 쉬지 그래?

1600823087.english: I never said I didn't like it.

1600823088.english: There is no need to give such a grand reward just because I rebuilt the Haka.
1600823088.korean: 하카를 재건해 줬다고 이렇게나 성대한 보답을 해줄 필요는 없는데.

1600823090.english: It's probably your first time. Can you handle it?

3000000000.english: T-14 Miho serves as the rear sniper of the Mongoose team.
3000000000.korean: T-14 미호는 몽구스 팀에서 후방 저격수 역할을 맡고 있습니다.

3000000036.english: This concludes Basic Tactical Training, Stage 2. The next training will include [c][ffd130][T-60 Bulgasari][-][/c], who opens the path for Mongoose Team.
3000000036.korean: 이것으로 초급 전술 훈련 2단계를 마치겠습니다.&n다음 훈련에는 몽구스 팀의 길을 열어주는 [c][ffd130][T-60 불가사리][-][/c]가 참여합니다.

3000000058.english: Hello, Commander! My name is P-24 Pinto. I fight to capture villains~
3000000058.korean: 안녕! 사령관! 내 이름은 P-24 핀토라고 해. 나는 악당을 잡기 위해서~

3000000060.english: According to the manual, a true hero must also know how to wait. Do you agree, P-24 Pinto?
3000000060.korean: 교본의 내용을 따르자면, 훌륭한 영웅은 기다릴 줄도 알아야한다고 합니다.&n동의하시나요? P-24 핀토?

3000000062.english: [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c] takes on a protective role in Mongoose Team along with [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c].
3000000062.korean: [c][ffd130][P-24 핀토][-][/c]는 [c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]와 함께 몽구스 팀을 보호하는 역할을 담당합니다.

3000000063.english: While [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c] is a protector who blocks enemy attacks with his shield through defense, [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c] is a protector who uses a flight device to disrupt the enemy through evasion.
3000000063.korean: [c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]가 방패로 적의 공격을 막아내는 방어력 중심의 보호기라면, [c][ffd130][P-24 핀토][-][/c]는 비행 장치를 이용해 적을 교란하는 회피율 중심의 보호기입니다.

3000000083.english: Mongoose Team's operations officer, the counter-terrorism specialist [c][ffd130][C-77 HongRyeon][-][/c], will be joining the squad.
3000000083.korean: 대테러 작전의 스페셜리스트인 몽구스 팀의 작전관 [c][ffd130][C-77 홍련][-][/c]이 스쿼드에 편성됩니다.

3000000089.english: [c][ffd130][C-77 HongRyeon][-][/c] is a supporter who strengthens Mongoose Team.

3000080104.english: Fortunately, [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c] has the [c][ffd130][Large Shield Deployment][-][/c] skill.&nUsing this skill greatly increases your [c][ffd130][Effect Resistance][-][/c] ability, allowing you to resist your enemy's [c][ffd130][Harmful Effects][-][/c].
3000080104.korean: 마침 [c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]에게는 [c][ffd130][대형 방패 전개][-][/c] 스킬이 있습니다.&n해당 스킬을 사용하면 [c][ffd130][효과 저항][-][/c] 능력이 크게 상승해 적의 [c][ffd130][해로운 효과][-][/c]에 저항할 수 있습니다.

3000080304.english: [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c] is a strong member.&nBelieve in her and move toward victory!
3000080304.korean: [c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]는 강인한 대원입니다.&n그녀를 믿고 승리를 향해 나아가십시오!

3000080408.english: When the trainee, [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c], equips the equipment,&nYou can more perfectly resist the enemy's [c][ffd130][harmful effects][-][/c].
3000080408.korean: 훈련 대상인 [c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]대원이 해당 장비를 장비할 시&n보다 완벽하게 적의 [c][ffd130][해로운 효과][-][/c]에 저항할 수 있습니다.

3000100102.english: [c][ffd130][Row Protection][-][/c]" is the ability to protect targets behind you.&n[c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c] activates [c][ffd130][Round Protection][-][/c] when the round begins.
3000100102.korean: [c][ffd130][행 보호][-][/c] 란, 자신을 기준으로 뒤에 있는 대상을 보호하는 능력입니다.&n[c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]는 라운드가 시작되면 [c][ffd130][행 보호][-][/c]가 활성화됩니다.

3000100103.english: In this formation, the [c][ffd130][T-14 Miho][-][/c] is behind the [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c].&nYou will enter the [c][ffd130][protection range][-][/c] of [c][ffd130][protection][-] [/c].
3000100103.korean: 이번 진형에서는 [c][ffd130][T-14 미호][-][/c]가 [c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]의 뒤에 있어&n[c][ffd130][행 보호][-][/c]의 [c][ffd130][보호 범위][-][/c] 안에 들어가게 됩니다.

3000100203.english: Here, I will explain the ability of [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c].

3000100206.english: You can prevent the situation that occurred earlier by using the skill of [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c].
3000100206.korean: [c][ffd130][P-24 핀토][-][/c]의 스킬을 이용해 앞서 일어났던 상황을 방지할 수 있습니다.

3000100209.english: Both skills have the ability to protect targets regardless of their location, but&nUnlike the protection provided by [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c], it requires additional action.&nIt may be difficult to use.
3000100209.korean: 두 스킬 모두 위치에 관계없이 대상을 보호할 수 있는 능력이지만,&n[c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]의 보호와는 달리 추가적으로 행동이 필요하다는 점에서&n사용하시기 까다로울 수 있습니다.

3000110101.english: I am [c][ffd130][T-14 Miho][-][/c], a member who has completed the promotion from A-rank to SS-rank.
3000110101.korean: A등급에서 SS등급으로 승급을 완료한 [c][ffd130][T-14 미호][-][/c]대원 입니다.

3000110103.english: As you know from previous training, in the case of [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c],&nYou can only protect your allies by using the 2nd skill, [c][ffd130][Acrobatic Flight][-][/c]."
3000110103.korean: 이전 훈련을 통해 아시겠지만 [c][ffd130][P-24 핀토][-][/c]의 경우,&n2번 스킬인 [c][ffd130][곡예 비행][-][/c]을 사용해야만 아군을 보호할 수 있습니다.

3000110104.english: However, if you're with a promoted [c][ffd130][T-14 Miho][-][/c] member, you can protect your allies without using [c][ffd130][Aerobatics][-][/c], and you'll also gain the ability to counterattack.
3000110104.korean: 하지만 승급을 마친 [c][ffd130][T-14 미호][-][/c]대원과 함께한다면 [c][ffd130][곡예 비행][-][/c]을 사용하지 않아도 아군을 보호할 수 있으며 추가적으로 반격 능력까지 생기게 되지요.

3000110107.english: The enemies are preparing to attack.&nLet's see how [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c] responds.
3000110107.korean: 적들이 공격을 준비 중입니다.&n[c][ffd130][P-24 핀토][-][/c]가 어떻게 대응하는지 확인해보도록 하죠.

3000110206.english: Please use the abilities of the promoted [c][ffd130][T-14 Miho][-][/c] to defeat the enemies.
3000110206.korean: 승급한 [c][ffd130][T-14 미호][-][/c]의 능력을 활용하여 적들을 처치해주시길 바랍니다.

3000110305.english: When the [c][ffd130][T-14 Miho][-][/c] is promoted to SS rank, the ability [c][ffd130][The lower the target's HP, the stronger the attack][-][/c] is always active, allowing you to eliminate enemies more quickly.
3000110305.korean: [c][ffd130][T-14 미호][-][/c]는 SS 등급까지 승급했을 경우, [c][ffd130][대상의 HP가 낮을수록 더 강한 공격을 가할 수 있는 능력][-][/c]이 상시로 적용되어 적을 더 빠르게 제거할 수 있습니다.

3000110403.english: You've worked hard, Your Excellency. You successfully completed the training using the abilities of [c][ffd130][T-14 Miho][-][/c], who has finished their promotion.
3000110403.korean: 고생하셨습니다, 각하. 승급을 마친 [c][ffd130][T-14 미호][-][/c]의 능력을 사용해 훈련을 성공적으로 마치셨습니다.

3000110404.english: As you've seen thru the training process, [c][ffd130][T-14 Miho][-][/c], who has completed [c][ffd130][Promotion][-][/c], is a powerful combatant, but she has a weakness: her attacks don't reach the enemy's back row when she's positioned in the back row herself.
3000110404.korean: 훈련 과정을 통해 확인하셨다시피 [c][ffd130][승급][-][/c]을 마친 [c][ffd130][T-14 미호][-][/c]는 강력한 전투원이지만, 후열에 위치할 경우 적의 후열까지는 그녀의 공격이 닿지 않는 약점이 있습니다.

3000110405.english: Even if you're in a state where you can provide attack support, you won't be able to support if the attack can't reach the target.&nIn preparation for that, the reward for this training is equipment suitable for [c][ffd130][T-14 Miho][-][/c]."
3000110405.korean: [c][ffd130][공격 지원][-][/c]이 가능한 상태더라도 공격이 닿지 않는 위치라면 지원을 할 수 없겠지요.&n그에 대비하여 이번 훈련의 보상으로는 [c][ffd130][T-14 미호][-][/c]에게 적합한 장비를 준비했습니다.

3000110408.english: Using this equipment, [c][ffd130][T-14 Miho][-][/c] can spot enemies even at greater distances.&n[c][ffd130][Mongoose Team][-][/c] will be able to support the attack.
3000110408.korean: 이 장비를 사용하는 [c][ffd130][T-14 미호][-][/c]는 보다 더 먼 거리의 적도 놓치지 않고&n[c][ffd130][몽구스 팀][-][/c]의 공격을 지원할 수 있을 것입니다.

3000120101.english: I am a member of the [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c] who has completed the SS promotion.

3000120103.english: The promoted [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c] can [c][ffd130][counterattack][-][/c] without using [c][ffd130][Aerobatics][-][/c].&n[c][ffd130][Row Protection][-][/c] ability as well.
3000120103.korean: 승급을 완료한 [c][ffd130][P-24 핀토][-][/c]는 [c][ffd130][곡예 비행][-][/c]을 사용하지 않아도 [c][ffd130][반격][-][/c]을 할 수 있으며&n[c][ffd130][행 보호][-][/c]능력 역시 보유하게 됩니다.

3000120301.english: Your Excellency, before the promotion, the [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c] was a [c][ffd130][Squadron Escort][-][/c], excluding protectors within a certain range.&nOnly mobile targets could be [c][ffd130][designated protected][-][/c].
3000120301.korean: 각하, 승급 전의 [c][ffd130][P-24 핀토][-][/c]는 [c][ffd130][편대 호위][-][/c]로 일정 범위 내의 보호기를 제외한&n기동형 대상만 [c][ffd130][지정 보호][-][/c]가 가능했습니다.

3000120601.english: [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c] will have their existing [c][ffd130][Aerobatics][-][/c] skill changed to the [c][ffd130][Mongoose Maneuver][-][/c] skill upon promotion to SS grade.
3000120601.korean: [c][ffd130][P-24 핀토][-][/c]는 SS 등급으로 승급하면 기존 [c][ffd130][곡예 비행][-][/c]이 [c][ffd130][몽구스 매뉴버][-][/c] 스킬로 변경됩니다.

3000120704.english: When [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c] is promoted to SS grade, the passive skill [c][ffd130][Hero's Appearance][-][/c] that is obtained is...&nAs a result, the duration effect of [c][ffd130][Acrobatic Flight][-][/c], which was the original second skill, is now applied as a basic effect, and the skill itself is changed to [c][ffd130][Mongoose Maneuver][-][/c]."
3000120704.korean: [c][ffd130][P-24 핀토][-][/c]가 SS 등급으로 승급 시, 획득하게 되는 패시브 스킬인 [c][ffd130][영웅 출현][-][/c]의&n영향으로 기존 2번째 스킬이었던 [c][ffd130][곡예 비행][-][/c]의 지속 효과가 기본 효과로 적용되고, 스킬은 [c][ffd130][몽구스 매뉴버][-][/c]로 변경됩니다.

3000120804.english: You've worked hard, Your Excellency. You have completed your training by effectively utilizing the enhanced [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c]!
3000120804.korean: 고생하셨습니다, 각하. 강화된 [c][ffd130][P-24 핀토][-][/c]의 능력을 적절하게 사용하시며 훈련을 마무리하셨습니다!

3000120805.english: [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c] The unit is an excellent protector, disrupting enemies and defending allies, but even before that,&nAs I mentioned, the [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c] only has minimal armor to maximize its mobility, so&nIf enemies with high accuracy appear, it could be dangerous.
3000120805.korean: [c][ffd130][P-24 핀토][-][/c]대원은 적을 교란하며 아군을 지키는 훌륭한 보호기이지만, 이전에도&n말씀드렸다시피 [c][ffd130][P-24 핀토][-][/c]는 기동성을 살리기 위해 최소한의 장갑만을 착용하고 있기에&n높은 적중률을 가진 적들이 나타나게 된다면 위험할 수 있습니다.

3000120806.english: We've prepared equipment as a reward that further enhances the evasion performance of such [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c]!
3000120806.korean: 그런 [c][ffd130][P-24 핀토][-][/c]의 회피 성능을 더욱 끌어올리는 장비를 보상으로 준비했습니다!

3000120807.english: I look forward to seeing the [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c] wearing this equipment put on a dazzling display of aerial combat, decimating their enemies.
3000120807.korean: 이 장비를 착용한 [c][ffd130][P-24 핀토][-][/c]가 적들을 유린하는 화려한 비행을 선보이길 기대하겠습니다.

3000130103.english: [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c] who completed S promotion, has acquired the [c][ffd130][All-Out Assault!][-][/c] passive skill, which&nIn addition to the existing [c][ffd130][Row Protection][-][/c] ability, it also provides additional protection to allied attackers and support units positioned in the [c][ffd130][Front Row][-][/c].&n[c][ffd130][Designated Protection][-][/c] can be applied.
3000130103.korean: S 승급을 완료한 [c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]는 [c][ffd130][전원 돌격!][-][/c] 패시브 스킬을 획득하여&n기존의 [c][ffd130][행 보호][-][/c]능력에 더해, [c][ffd130][전열][-][/c]에 위치한 아군 공격기와 지원기를 추가로&n[c][ffd130][지정 보호][-][/c] 할 수 있습니다.

3000130501.english: The newly introduced Wasp HM has the attack [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c]'s [c][ffd130][Row Protection][-][/c], [c][ffd130][Target Protection][-][/c], and [c][ffd130][Self Protection][-][/c].&nIgnoring them, they inflict the [c][ffd130][harmful effect][-][/c] [c][ffd130][Ignite][-][/c] on allies."
3000130501.korean: 새로 등장한  와습 HM은 공격은 [c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]의 [c][ffd130][행 보호][-][/c], [c][ffd130][지정 보호][-][/c]를&n무시하며 아군에게 [c][ffd130][해로운 효과][-][/c] 인 [c][ffd130][점화][-][/c]를 부여합니다.

3000130502.english: If you have [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c], you can resist the enemy's [c][ffd130][Ignite][-][/c] by using [c][ffd130][Deploy Large Shield][-][/c] to increase your effect resistance, but...
3000130502.korean: [c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]라면 [c][ffd130][대형 방패 전개][-][/c]로 효과 저항을 상승시켜 적의 [c][ffd130][점화][-][/c]에 저항할 수 있지만…

3000130506.english: [c][ffd130][Tit for Tat][-][/c] taunts all enemy protectors at the start of the round, disables protector ignore, and&nWhen [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c] is hit, it reduces the AP of taunted enemies and increases the damage they take.
3000130506.korean: [c][ffd130][팃포탯][-][/c]은 라운드 개시 시 모든 적 보호기를 도발하고, 보호 무시를 비활성화 하며,&n[c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]가 피격 시, 도발 상태인 적의 AP를 감소시키고, 받는 피해를 증가시킵니다.

3000130507.english: However, what you should pay attention to now is that [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c] has the attack support effect applied.&nWhen in that state, the effect of using [c][ffd130][Deploy Large Shield][-][/c] applies to the entire allied team.
3000130507.korean: 하지만 지금 주목하실 부분은 [c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]가 공격 지원 효과가 적용된&n상태일 때, [c][ffd130][대형 방패 전개][-][/c]의 사용 효과가 아군 전체에게 적용되는 점입니다.

3000130508.english: Fortunately, the [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c] is currently receiving attack support from the [c][ffd130][T-14 Miho][-][/c].
3000130508.korean: 마침 [c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]가 [c][ffd130][T-14 미호][-][/c]에게 공격 지원을 받고 있는 상황입니다.

3000130510.english: Use [c][ffd130][Deploy Large Shield][-][/c] to protect the [c][ffd130][T-14 Miho][-][/c] and [c][ffd130][T-60 Bulgasari][-][/c] and achieve victory, Your Excellency!
3000130510.korean: [c][ffd130][대형 방패 전개][-][/c]를 사용하여 [c][ffd130][T-14 미호][-][/c]와 [c][ffd130][T-60 불가사리][-][/c]를 지켜내고 승리를 얻어내십시오, 각하!

3000130616.english: [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c] is a unit that protects allies with excellent defensive capabilities, allowing them to employ more aggressive tactics.
3000130616.korean: [c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]는 우수한 보호 능력으로 아군을 보호하고, 아군이 보다 공격적으로 전술을 펼칠 수 있게 돕는 대원입니다.

3000130617.english: However, the ATK of the [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c] is not considered excellent.
3000130617.korean: 하지만 정작 [c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]의 공격 능력은 우수하다고 보기 힘듭니다.

3000130621.english: Please use this equipment to help the [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c] achieve even better results.
3000130621.korean: 이 장비를 활용하여 [c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c]가 더욱 우수한 성과를 거두게 하시고.

3000140106.english: And if there is [c][ffd130][C-77 Crimson][-][/c] or [c][ffd130][T-14 Miho][-][/c] in the squad,&nGrants half the [c][ffd130][ATK][-][/c] / [c][ffd130][Critical Hit][-][/c] increase effect to all allies.
3000140106.korean: 그리고 스쿼드 내에 [c][ffd130][C-77 홍련][-][/c] 혹은 [c][ffd130][T-14 미호][-][/c]가 있을 경우,&n아군 전체에게 [c][ffd130][공격력][-][/c] / [c][ffd130][치명타][-][/c] 증가 효과의 절반을 부여하고.

3000140107.english: If [c][ffd130][AS-12 Steel Draco][-][/c] and [c][ffd130][P-24 Pinto][-][/c] are present,&nGrants all allies half of the [c][ffd130][Effect Resistance Increase][-][/c] / [c][ffd130][Damage Received Reduction][-][/c] effects.
3000140107.korean: [c][ffd130][AS-12 스틸 드라코][-][/c], [c][ffd130][P-24 핀토][-][/c]가 있을 경우에는&n아군 전체에게 [c][ffd130][효과 저항 증가][-][/c] / [c][ffd130][받는 피해 감소][-][/c] 효과의 절반을 부여합니다.

3000140108.english: This significantly improves the offensive capabilities of squads with the promoted [c][ffd130][T-60 Bulgasari][-][/c].
3000140108.korean: 이를 통해 승급한 [c][ffd130][T-60 불가사리][-][/c]가 있는 스쿼드는 공격적인 능력이 눈에 띄게 향상됩니다.

3000140304.english: I hope this training course has provided you with sufficient education on the abilities of [c][ffd130][T-60 Bulgasari][-][/c], and we have prepared equipment that will make her attacks even stronger.
3000140304.korean: 이번 훈련 과정을 통해 [c][ffd130][T-60 불가사리][-][/c]의 능력에 대한 충분한 교육이 되었길 바라며, 그녀의 공격을 더욱 강하게 해 줄 장비를 준비했습니다.

3100020107.english: However, Ms. Wraithy's skills deal [c][ffd130][Electric Type][-][/c] damage, so&nYou can inflict damage on the training AMG-11 by ignoring its [c][ffd130][Defense][-][/c].
3100020107.korean: 하지만 레이시 씨의 스킬들은 [c][ffd130][전기 속성][-][/c]의 피해를 입히기에&n훈련용 AMG-11의 [c][ffd130][방어력][-][/c]을 무시하고 피해를 입힐 수가 있습니다.

3100020108.english: Let's give Mr. Wraithy the order to attack and see.
3100020108.korean: 레이시 씨에게 공격 명령을 내려 확인해 보도록 하죠.

3100020306.english: Just like before, I've ordered Ms. Wraithy to attack, and the difference in [c][ffd130][attribute resistance][-][/c] between the two aircraft is...&nLet's see what results it shows.
3100020306.korean: 방금 전처럼 레이시 씨에게 공격 명령을 내려 두 기체의 [c][ffd130][속성 저항][-][/c]의 차이가&n어떤 결과를 보여주는지 확인해보시죠.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_42.english: The T-40 Hyena went to the bathroom, so I suddenly needed to pee too…
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_42.korean: 하이에나가 화장실 가니까 나도 갑자기 마려워졌어…

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_59.english: Uhuhu... Watching a movie with Captain Khan the Swift...

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_81.english: How about Captain Khan the Swift?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_15.english: Captain Khan the Swift watched the movie and said, "It's cool," adding, "I wish I could do something like that too."
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_15.korean: 칸 대장이 영화를 보고 '멋지다'면서 '자기도 저런 걸 해봤으면 좋겠다'고 말한거.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_2.english: I'm telling you, Captain Khan the Swift must have been drawn to the intense action, too!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_2.korean: 역시 칸 대장도 뜨거운 액션에 끌린 게 틀림없다니까?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_20.english: Hmm... certainly... I don't recall Captain Khan the Swift ever mentioning that he wanted to have or do anything until now.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_20.korean: 음… 확실히… 칸 대장님이 지금까지 뭔가 가지고 싶다던가, 하고 싶다는 말을 꺼낸 기억이 없네요.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_27.english: I'm really curious what Captain Khan the Swift wants.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_27.korean: 칸 대장이 원하는 게 뭔지 정말 궁금한걸?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_3.english: But compared to Captain Khan the Swift's usual fighting style, isn't that slow and boring?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_3.korean: 라고 하기에는 칸 대장의 평소 전투 방식에 비하면 저건 느리고 시시하잖아?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_30.english: I owe Captain Khan the Swift a lot, so something like this wouldn't be bad once in a while.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_30.korean:
평소에 칸 대장에게는 신세를 많이 졌으니까.
가끔은 이런 것도 나쁘지 않겠지.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_33.english: Okay. I'd like to do something for Captain Khan the Swift too!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_33.korean: 좋아요. 저도 칸 대장님을 위해서라면 뭔가 해드리고 싶어요!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_35.english: Let's all join forces and make sure to find and fulfill what Captain Khan the Swift wants!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_35.korean: 우리 모두 힘을 합쳐서, 칸 대장님이 바라시는 걸 꼭 찾아내 이뤄드리는 거예요!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_5.english: Hmm... considering Captain Khan the Swift's reaction, that probably isn't it.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_5.korean: 음… 칸 대장님의 반응을 생각하면 그건 아닐 거예요.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_52.english: Hmm... but what exactly in this final highlight scene did Captain Khan the Swift see that made him say it was cool?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_52.korean: 음… 그런데 칸 대장님은 이 마지막 하이라이트 장면의 어디를 보고 멋지다고 한 걸까요?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_59.english: No, no, it's the Swift Khan, isn't it? I told you it's a sports car, driven by the instinct to race!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_59.korean: 아니, 아니 신속의 칸이잖아? 질주 본능에 따라 스포츠 카라니까?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_6.english: Captain Khan the Swift must be impressed by the spectacular explosion, too!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_6.korean: 칸 대장도 분명 화려한 폭발에 감명을 받는 걸 거야!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_66.english: Hmm... I'm not entirely sure, but I don't think Captain Khan the Swift's taste is among what's been shown so far.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_66.korean: 음… 확신할 수 없지만, 지금 나온 것들 중에서는 칸 대장님의 취향이 없는 것 같아요.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_68.english: So, Feather, do you know what Captain Khan the Swift wants?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_68.korean: 그럼 페더, 너는 칸 대장이 원하는 게 뭔지 알겠어?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_71.english: Since Captain Khan the Swift has never expressed what he wants so directly like this...
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_71.korean: 칸 대장님이 이렇게 직접적으로 원하는 걸 표현한 적이 없으시다 보니…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_73.english: If you, who know Captain Khan the Swift better than anyone, say that, it’s practically the same as saying no one here knows.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_73.korean: 칸 대장님을 누구보다 잘 아는 네가 그렇게 말하면, 여기선 아무도 모르는 거나 다름없는 거야.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_80.english: And above all, isn't it important that we are doing something for Captain Khan the Swift?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_80.korean: 그리고 무엇보다 저희들이 칸 대장님을 위해 무언가 해드린다는 게 중요한 게 아닐까요?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_86.english: Well then, everyone, be careful not to get caught by Captain Khan the Swift for the time being.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_86.korean: 그럼, 당분간 칸 대장에게 들키지 않도록 모두 조심해.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_87.english: Leave Captain Khan the Swift's surveillance to me!

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_10.english: Besides, I'm always getting help from Khan the Swift too.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_10.korean: 게다가 칸에게는 나도 늘 도움받고 있으니까.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_11.english: Whatever Khan the Swift wants, if he needs my help, I'll gladly assist him.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_11.korean: 칸이 뭘 원하든, 내 도움이 필요하다면 얼마든지 돕겠어.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_14.english: So you're saying it's what Khan the Swift wants... He's never clearly stated what he wanted until now.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_14.korean: 칸이 원하는 거라니… 지금까지 속시원히 뭔가를 원한다고 한 적 없었잖아.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_27.english: I'll roll up my sleeves and help for Khan the Swift.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_27.korean: 칸을 위해서라면 내가 두 팔 걷고 도와줄게.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_30.english: If Khan the Swift wants a cool guy... I can't miss out.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_30.korean: 칸이 원하는 게 멋진 남자라면… 내가 빠질 수 없잖아.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_40.english: What about C-11 Scarabya and E-16 Talon Feather?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_41.english: C-11 Scarabya started producing sports cars.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_43.english: E-16 Talon Feather is acting as a lookout to ensure Captain Khan the Swift doesn't find out we're preparing a surprise.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_43.korean: 탈론페더는 칸 대장한테 우리가 서프라이즈 준비하는 거 들키지 않게 감시역이고.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_47.english: T-4 Kheshig, please go to the Taylor and ask if they can prepare a dress that fits Khan the Swift.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_47.korean: 케시크는 테일러한테 가서 칸에게 맞는 드레스를 준비할 수 있는지 물어봐 줘.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_50.english: Hmm... then please pass this on. Tell them that they can postpone making my clothes, so please prioritize Khan the Swift.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_50.korean:
음… 그럼 이렇게 전해줘.
내 옷 제작은 미뤄도 되니까, 칸 쪽을 우선으로 부탁한다고.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_54.english: T-75 War Wolf and Salamander, go to the Orca Maintenance Squad and ask them to provide some support for the production of the C-11 Scarabya sports car.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_54.korean:
워울프랑 샐러맨더는 오르카 정비반으로 가서,
스카라비아 스포츠카 제작에 지원 좀 붙여달라고 요청해 줘.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_60.english: Quick Camel and T-40 Hyena, go to Lumberjane and ask him to set up a cool city nightscape.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_60.korean:
퀵 카멜이랑 하이에나는 럼버제인에게 가서
도시 야경 세팅을 멋지게 꾸며달라고 부탁해줘.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_78.english: Khan the Swift… does he have anything he wants from the Horde members?
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_78.korean: 칸은… 호드 대원들에게 바라는 게 있어?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_89.english: … Khan the Swift, I don't know what you're hoping for, but.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_23.english: Then I'll go give Captain Khan the Swift the promise to meet.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_23.korean: 그럼 저는 칸 대장님께 만나자는 약속을 전달하고 올게요~

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_28.english: Is that T-4 Kheshig? What's going on—

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_30.english: Wait… T-4 Kheshig? Why are you suddenly hugging me—
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_30.korean: 잠깐… 케시크? 왜 갑자기 날 껴안는—

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_32.english: Alright! T-4 Kheshig is holding him now, so we're taking him away just like this!
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_32.korean: 좋아! 케시크가 붙잡고 있는 지금, 이대로 연행한다!

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_48.english: Looking into that gaze... if this is the 'Swift Khan' the Commander desired... then standing here like this, living up to those expectations, is quite to my liking.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_48.korean:
그 눈빛을 보고 있으니 말이지.​
사령관이 바란 ‘신속의 칸’의 모습이 이런 거라면…​
그 기대에 맞춰 이렇게 서 있는 이 모습도, 꽤 마음에 드는군.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_72.english: Khan the Swift, was there something you really wanted among the things the Horde guys and I prepared...?
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_72.korean: 칸은 호드 녀석들과 내가 준비한 것들 중에… 정말 원하는 게 있었어?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_78.english: So, what was it that was cool about Khan the Swift?
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_78.korean: 그럼 어떤 부분이 칸에게 멋졌던 거야?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_89.english: If it's Khan the Swift, it's possible.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_92.english: Not just me… everyone will move forward with Khan the Swift.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_92.korean: 나뿐만 아니라… 모두가 칸과 함께 나아갈 거야.

BridalClass1-1ED_106.english: You mean the ability to have meals even when Sowan isn’t around… and to raise the commander’s and our child even when Maria of Redemption isn’t around, right?
BridalClass1-1ED_106.korean:
소완 님이 계시지 않아도 식사를 할 수 있고… 마리아 님이 
계시지 않아도 주인님과 저희의 아이를 키울 수 있는 능력 말씀이시죠?

BridalClass1-1ED_11.english: …X-05 Emily? Why are you dangerously climbing onto the desk? And why are you patting your stomach?
BridalClass1-1ED_11.korean:
…에밀리 양? 위험하게 왜 책상 위로 올라가시는 거죠?
그리고 왜 배를 두드리시는 거죠?

BridalClass1-1ED_114.english: That's a really good idea, Prototype Labiata sister!

BridalClass1-1ED_129.english: You actually look more tired than I do, Vanilla A1. I'll tell Constantia S2 to take your work off your plate today.
BridalClass1-1ED_129.korean:
나보단 오히려 바닐라 네가 피곤해보이는걸. 
내가 콘스탄챠한테 말해서 오늘 네 업무를 빼줄게.

BridalClass1-1ED_134.english: - At Vanilla A1's cute, playful grumbling, I spread my arms with a satisfied smile, and just as Vanilla A1 scampered over and leaned against me, I was about to nuzzle my lips against her soft forehead.
BridalClass1-1ED_134.korean:
- 바닐라의 애교 섞인 투덜거림에 나는 흐뭇하게 팔을 벌렸고,
쪼르르 다가와 내게 안기는 바닐라의 보드라운 이마에 입술을 비비려는 순간이었다.

BridalClass1-1ED_137.english:
- After Vanilla A1 quickly pulled away from me, she cleared her throat.  
After the door opened, Prototype Labiata, who came in, smiled at Vanilla A1.
BridalClass1-1ED_137.korean:
- 바닐라가 황급히 내게서 떨어진 후, 목소리를 가다듬었다.
문이 열린 후, 안으로 들어 온 라비아타는 바닐라에게 웃어보였다.

BridalClass1-1ED_14.english: "X-05 Emily, have AT-100 Beast Hunter come to my office soon. Just because you’re patting your belly doesn’t mean you’re going to have a baby."
BridalClass1-1ED_14.korean:
에밀리 양, 조만간 비스트헌터 양과 함께 제 집무실로 오도록 해요.
배를 통통 두드린다고 해서 아이가 생기는 건 아니랍니다.

BridalClass1-1ED_146.english: "At Prototype Labiata's serious words, I glanced to the side and saw Vanilla A1, her face bright red even as she was tidying up my bedding, quietly repeating 'Mom.'"
BridalClass1-1ED_146.korean:
- 라비아타의 진지한 말에 힐끔, 옆을 보자, 내 이부자리를 정리하면서도
얼굴이 새빨개 진 채, '엄마'라고 되뇌이는 바닐라를 보았다.

BridalClass1-1ED_154.english: - Prototype Labiata's opinion was quite reasonable.

BridalClass1-1ED_157.english: Alright, Vanilla A1. Shall we tidy up the bedding together today?
BridalClass1-1ED_157.korean: 자, 바닐라. 오늘은 나랑 같이 이부자리를 정리할까?

BridalClass1-1ED_158.english: Ah… I-I'm okay, Prototype Labiata sister! You must be busy…
BridalClass1-1ED_158.korean: 아앗… 괘, 괜찮아요, 라비아타 언니! 바쁘실텐데…

BridalClass1-1ED_16.english: T-2 Brownie told me that if you get the commander drunk, you might end up with a baby.
BridalClass1-1ED_16.korean: 사령관한테 술을 먹이면 아기가 생길 수도 있다고 브라우니가 알려줬어.

BridalClass1-1ED_160.english: - After Prototype Labiata and Vanilla A1 organized the sheets, I carefully went through Raviata's plan.
BridalClass1-1ED_160.korean:
- 라비아타와 바닐라가 시트를 정리해 나간 후,
나는 라비아타의 기획안을 차근히 읽어보았다.

BridalClass1-1ED_164.english: Hmm… I read the proposal for the Prototype Labiata campaign that you sent me.
BridalClass1-1ED_164.korean: 흐음… 주인님께서 보내주신 라비아타 통령의 기획안은 잘 읽었어요.

BridalClass1-1ED_174.english: Leader Prototype Labiata is kind of like the mother of all bioroids.
BridalClass1-1ED_174.korean: 라비아타 통령은 모든 바이오로이드의 어머니와도 같은 위치에 계시니까요.

BridalClass1-1ED_177.english: Now that you say that, I guess I should leave it to Prototype Labiata too.

BridalClass1-1ED_178.english: Let's have Prototype Labiata handle the whole competition this time, and I'll support you if you need anything.
BridalClass1-1ED_178.korean: 이번 대회는 라비아타가 전부 맡는 걸로 하고, 필요한 게 있으면 내가 지원해줄게.

BridalClass1-1ED_179.english: Help Prototype Labiata get ready for the competition.
BridalClass1-1ED_179.korean: 라비아타를 도와 대회를 잘 준비해 줘.

BridalClass1-1ED_2.english: Let's give a round of applause to President Prototype Labiata, who took time out of their busy schedule to come and evaluate your studies!
BridalClass1-1ED_2.korean:
바쁜 와중에도 시간을 내어 여러분의 학업을 평가하러 오신 
라비아타 통령을 박수로 맞이해 주세요!

BridalClass1-1ED_3.english: Nice to meet you all. Thanks also to Alexandra of Resonance for the warm welcome.
BridalClass1-1ED_3.korean: 반가워요, 여러분. 환대를 배풀어주신 알렉산드라 님께도 감사드립니다.

BridalClass1-1ED_35.english: ...I guess I'll have to call E-16 Talon Feather over separately soon and have a training session.
BridalClass1-1ED_35.korean: ...조만간 탈론페더 양도 따로 불러 훈육 시간을 가져야겠네요.

BridalClass1-1ED_36.english: Prototype Labiata, I have a question.

BridalClass1-1ED_5.english: I really enjoyed your presentation. As expected, Ms. Alexandra of Resonance is teaching you all diligently.
BridalClass1-1ED_5.korean: 여러분의 발표 정말 잘 들었어요. 역시 알렉산드라 선생님께서 여러분을 열심히 가르치고 계시는군요.

BridalClass1-1ED_66.english: Ha, I'm gonna go crazy… Don't you know my lace bra has completely shrunk because of you?! I even went out and bought super fancy underwear from Audrey Dreamweaver to show the commander…
BridalClass1-1ED_66.korean:
하, 내 돌아삐겠다 아이가… 니 때문에 내 레이스 부라자가 확 쭐어 삔거 모르나?!
사령관님한테 보여줄라고 기껏 오드리한테 억수로 까리한 속옷도 샀고마…

BridalClass1-1ED_67.english: Can I be honest? Honestly, AC-6 Hussar, it’s not like your chest is even that big.
BridalClass1-1ED_67.korean: …소신발언 해도 될까? 솔직히 후사르 너 가슴이 엄청 큰 것도 아니잖아.

BridalClass1-1ED_71.english: ...As expected, the path to perfectly recreating Hachiko of Castling's meat pie is long and tough.
BridalClass1-1ED_71.korean: …역시, 하치코 씨의 완벽한 미트파이를 따라 만드는 길이란 멀고도 험난하군요.

BridalClass1-1ED_72.english: Atalanta the Nimble, this thing is flashing blue light, is it really a meatpie? …
BridalClass1-1ED_72.korean: 아탈란테 님, 이거 파란 빛이 번쩍거리는데 정말 미트파이 맞아요?

BridalClass1-1ED_73.english:
I made it following the recipe Hachiko of Castling gave me… and this is what came out.  
I don’t know why the Orca folks want to put this pie in the nuclear fuel pool…
BridalClass1-1ED_73.korean:
하치코 씨가 일러준 레시피 대로 만들었는데… 이런 결과물이 나왔습니다.
오르카 분들께선 왜 이 파이를 핵연료 수조에 두고 오라 하는지 모르겠지만…

BridalClass1-1ED_76.english: By the way, Hachiko of Castling. You look happy. Did something happen?
BridalClass1-1ED_76.korean:
그나저나 하치코 씨. 기분이 좋아 보이시는군요.
무슨 일이라도 있으셨습니까?

BridalClass1-1ED_79.english: ...No way. Hachiko of Castling's mint chocolate mint pie must be really delicious... I'm jealous.
BridalClass1-1ED_79.korean: …이럴 수가. 하치코 씨의 민트초코 미트파이가 얼마나 맛있으면… 부럽습니다.

BridalClass1-1ED_81.english: Now that I think about it, Atalanta the Nimble, those food lights are flashing, and I thought if we showed them to Master, he'd like them because they're pretty and beautiful!
BridalClass1-1ED_81.korean:
그러고 보니까 아탈란테 님, 그 음식 불빛이 번쩍번쩍 거리는데
주인님께 보여드리면 예쁘고 아름다워서 좋아하실 것 같다는 생각이 들었어요!

BridalClass1-1ED_83.english: Yeah~ I've never seen a meat pie this unique before! Black Lilith said that if the food you make is pretty, you'll have a pretty child!
BridalClass1-1ED_83.korean:
네~ 이렇게 특이한 미트파이는 처음 봤거든요!
리리스 언니가 그러는데, 직접 만든 음식이 예쁘면 예쁜 아이를 낳는다고 했어요!

BridalClass1-1ED_87.english: Oh, Constantia S2. You said you weren't going to work after getting off work.
BridalClass1-1ED_87.korean: 어머, 콘스탄챠. 퇴근하면 일은 하지 않기로 했잖니.

BridalClass1-1ED_97.english: Serapias Alice really… is so embarrassing…

BridalClass1-2ED_130.english: I heard from C-33 Andvari that now the supplies are steadily sufficient…
BridalClass1-2ED_130.korean: 안드바리한테 듣기론 이젠 보급품이 안정적으로 넉넉하다는데…

BridalClass1-2ED_138.english: If you wear it after taking it… Daphne and Scissors Lise will hate it.

BridalClass1-2ED_141.english: Hmm… Captain Indomitable Marie, the intention is good, but… it feels kind of more dangerous…
BridalClass1-2ED_141.korean: 으음… 마리 대장, 취지는 좋은데… 뭔가 더 위험한 느낌이…

BridalClass1-2ED_147.english:
…Indomitable Marie's look doesn't seem ordinary.  
Still, out of all the clothes I've seen, this one's… kind of better.
BridalClass1-2ED_147.korean:
…마리의 눈빛이 심상치 않아 보이는구나.
그래도 봐왔던 옷 중 가장… 낫긴 한데.

BridalClass1-2ED_176.english: The Main Girl, The Chef's Diary, only Scissors Lise…
BridalClass1-2ED_176.korean: 우리동네 정실대장 님, 주방장의 혼잣말 님, 오직 리제만 님…

BridalClass1-2ED_179.english: Well, the master's wife can only be Scissors Lise.
BridalClass1-2ED_179.korean: 그야 주인님의 아내는 오직 리제만 가능하니까요.

BridalClass1-2ED_180.english: Scissors Lise, you actually came wearing pretty neat clothes?
BridalClass1-2ED_180.korean: 리제양, 의외로 단정한 옷을 입고 오셨군요?

BridalClass1-2ED_211.english: Prototype Labiata, you look like you have a lot on your mind.

BridalClass1-2ED_33.english: I guess I should hurry and ask the Audrey Dreamweaver sisters for some new outfits…
BridalClass1-2ED_33.korean: 아무래도 서둘러 오드리 자매분께 새로운 의상을 부탁해야…

BridalClass1-2ED_66.english: Hoho, Commander Prototype Labiata. Did you say that you need the superior insight contained in my matter?
BridalClass1-2ED_66.korean: 후훗, 라비아타 통령. 짐의 사안에 담긴 우월한 통찰이 필요하다 하였느냐?

BridalClass1-2ED_85.english: It's something I've felt every time I see Sekhmet of Death…

BridalClass1-2ED_95.english: ...Serapias Alice. In public settings, you should call him 'Judge.'

BridalClass1-3ED_115.english: I want to prove to that gardener and Miss Black Lilith that my skills are not limited to just cooking.
BridalClass1-3ED_115.korean: 그 정원사와 리리스 양께 소첩 능력의 한계가 요리 뿐이 아님을 증명하고 싶사옵니다.

BridalClass1-3ED_135.english: Black Lilith sister, did you call me?

BridalClass1-3ED_136.english: Yeah, CS Perrault. I've folded all the laundry here, so please put them nicely in the kids' closet, okay?
BridalClass1-3ED_136.korean: 응, 페로. 여기 세탁한 옷 다 개어 놨으니까 아이들 옷장에 잘 놔두렴?

BridalClass1-3ED_147.english: It's not that… CS Perrault… can you listen to my worries for a bit? Household support… that's the first topic. I don't know if I can get through it well…
BridalClass1-3ED_147.korean:
그게 아니라… 페로… 내 고민 좀 들어줄래?
내조… 그게 첫 번째 주제인데. 잘 통과할 수 있을지 모르겠어...

BridalClass1-3ED_149.english: Judging by Leader Prototype Labiata's actions… it seems like she's talking about the basic qualities one should have as a 'perfect wife.'
BridalClass1-3ED_149.korean: 라비아타 통령의 행보를 봐선… '완벽한 아내'로서 갖춰야 할 기본 소양을 말하는 것 같아.

BridalClass1-3ED_152.english: Since we specialize in security... wouldn't we just look like amateurs in leader Prototype Labiata's eyes?
BridalClass1-3ED_152.korean:
우린 경호를 전문적으로 하다 보니... 
라비아타 통령의 눈에는 그저 아마추어처럼 보이지 않을까?

BridalClass1-3ED_154.english:
…Hehe, thanks for saying that, CS Perrault.  
I shouldn’t have said something weak just because I’m your older sister…
BridalClass1-3ED_154.korean:
…후후, 말이라도 고마워 페로.
괜히 언니로써 약한 말이나 하고…

BridalClass1-3ED_176.english: I might end up getting laughed at by Scissors Lise and Sowan for no reason.
BridalClass1-3ED_176.korean: 괜히 이러다 리제랑 소완에게 비웃음 살지도 모르겠네.

BridalClass1-3ED_178.english: CS Perrault, you're really close to being the perfect wife, you know, being kind enough to comfort your sister.
BridalClass1-3ED_178.korean: 페로야말로 완벽한 아내에 가깝구나, 착한 마음씨로 언니를 위로할 줄도 알고 말이야.

BridalClass1-3ED_179.english: No way! Black Lilith sister would never fail. She’s always doing the laundry and cleaning at our place!
BridalClass1-3ED_179.korean:
아냐! 리리스 언니는 절대 떨어질 리 없어.
늘 우리 숙소에서 빨래랑 청소를 해주잖아!

BridalClass1-3ED_180.english: Black Lilith is definitely going to be the perfect bride!
BridalClass1-3ED_180.korean: 리리스 언니는 분명 완벽한 신부가 틀림없어!

BridalClass1-3ED_181.english: Fenrir. Sister Black Lilith isn't a maid who takes care of things for you.
BridalClass1-3ED_181.korean: 펜리르. 리리스 언니는 당신 뒤치다꺼리를 대신 해주는 메이드가 아니에요.

BridalClass1-3ED_182.english: While we're at it, go ahead and do the cleaning around here or any random errands yourself. Be thankful that Black Lilith is our oldest sister.
BridalClass1-3ED_182.korean:
이 김에 주변 청소라던가, 잡다한 심부름은 직접 하세요.
리리스 언니가 저희 맏언니인 걸 감사하게 생각하시죠.

BridalClass1-3ED_183.english: If Fenrir had joined the Battle Maids like Hirume of Heavenly Incense, he would have had a hard time every day.
BridalClass1-3ED_183.korean: 펜리르가 히루메처럼 배틀 메이드에 들어갔다면 매일 고생했을 거예요.

BridalClass1-3ED_184.english: Heehee~ That's why I like Black Lilith the most!
BridalClass1-3ED_184.korean: 이히히~ 그래서 난 리리스 언니가 제일 좋아!

BridalClass1-3ED_187.english: I'll show you guys that this Black Lilith is a step above the Stalker and Sowan.
BridalClass1-3ED_187.korean: 이 리리스가 스토커와 소완보다 한 수 위란 걸 너희들에게도 보여줄게.

BridalClass1-3ED_188.english: - After the preliminaries ended, I got the results from Prototype Labiata… Somehow, I let out a sigh.
BridalClass1-3ED_188.korean: - 예선전이 끝난 후 라비아타에게 결과를 보고받았는데… 왠지 한숨이 나왔다.

BridalClass1-3ED_199.english: - ...Certainly, you can't ignore Prototype Labiata's experience that has existed since the time of the old humans.
BridalClass1-3ED_199.korean: - …확실히, 구 인류가 존재했을 때부터 살아왔던 라비아타의 경륜은 무시할 수 없다.

BridalClass1-3ED_2.english: Oh, Scissors Lise sister. What are you doing?
BridalClass1-3ED_2.korean: 어머, 리제 언니. 뭐 하고 계세요?

BridalClass1-3ED_201.english: Okay, it's unfamiliar, but I'll give it a try. Prototype Labiata. Keep up the good work.
BridalClass1-3ED_201.korean: 알겠어, 낯설지만 한 번 해볼게. 라비아타. 계속 수고해줘.

BridalClass1-3ED_29.english: The first event in Prototype Labiata's test is the '4 Events of Being a Supportive Wife'.
BridalClass1-3ED_29.korean: 라비아타가 낸 첫 번째 시험의 종목은 '내조 4종 경기'야.

BridalClass1-3ED_31.english: I see... phew... I was wondering if I did something wrong to Scissors Lise-sister again…
BridalClass1-3ED_31.korean: 그러셨군요… 휴우… 전 또 리제 언니한테 잘못한 게 있나 싶었어요…

BridalClass1-3ED_43.english: Yeah, Scissors Lise. I really like seeing you lately; it feels like you've grown a lot.
BridalClass1-3ED_43.korean: 그래, 리제. 요새 널 볼 때마다 많이 성장한 것 같아서 보기 좋아.

BridalClass1-3ED_44.english: Even Titania failed... Scissors Lise, seeing you be the only one of our sisters to pass somehow makes me feel proud.
BridalClass1-3ED_44.korean: 티타니아도 떨어졌는데... 리제 네가 자매들 중 유일하게 붙은 모습을 보니까 괜히 뿌듯하네.

BridalClass1-3ED_46.english: Supporting your partner... the topic is pretty abstract. Did Scissors Lise’s friends all say they didn’t know?
BridalClass1-3ED_46.korean: 내조라… 주제가 상당히 추상적이네. 리제 친구들은 다 모른다고 했니?

BridalClass1-3ED_48.english: I'm talking about Black Lilith and Sowan.

BridalClass1-3ED_52.english: Ahaha… I'm lacking too, but I want to help Scissors Lise.
BridalClass1-3ED_52.korean: 아하하… 나도 부족하지만 리제한테 도움이 되고 싶어서.

BridalClass1-3ED_60.english: I’m not really sure what Prototype Labiata sister will be testing, but it probably won’t be an exam on the professional knowledge that maids typically know.
BridalClass1-3ED_60.korean:
라비아타 언니가 뭘 시험 볼진 잘 모르겠지만,
메이드 분들이 대표적으로 알고 있는 전문적인 지식을 시험 보는 게 아닐 거야.

BridalClass1-3ED_63.english: And… that's your charm, Scissors Lise.

BridalClass1-3ED_8.english: I've done a few loads of laundry sometimes at the request of Vanilla A1 or Rhea, but…
BridalClass1-3ED_8.korean: 가끔 바닐라나 레아 언니 부탁으로 세탁기를 몇 번 돌려보긴 했지만…

BridalClass1-3ED_93.english: Fotia of Fireside and my underwear got the chef's swimsuit in water…
BridalClass1-3ED_93.korean: 포티아랑 제 속옷에 주방장님 수영복 물이 들어서…

BridalClass1-4ED_108.english:
"Why would a pest even dare fly onto our master's precious body?  
The only one allowed to fly into our master's arms is Scissors Lise."
BridalClass1-4ED_108.korean:
어딜 해충 따위가 하나뿐인 주인님의 옥체에 날아들죠?
주인님의 품에 날아들 수 있는 건 오직 리제뿐이라고요.

BridalClass1-4ED_110.english: It's okay, Master… ah…♥ Scissors Lise will protect you. Okay? Masterㅡ
BridalClass1-4ED_110.korean: 괜찮아요, 주인님은… 아아…♥ 리제가 지켜줄게요. 응? 주인님ㅡ

BridalClass1-4ED_112.english: It's not like only Scissors Lise's actions are meaningless. Pests are also sources of disease, spreading illnesses around.
BridalClass1-4ED_112.korean:
오직 리제만 도전자님의 행동이 의미 없는 건 아니에요.
해충은 질병을 옮기고 다니는 병의 근원이기도 하죠.

BridalClass1-4ED_114.english: ...Alright. Only Scissors Lise will be allowed to pass as a challenger.

BridalClass1-4ED_135.english: If master stays up all night with Miss Vargrr, the next day smells awful—
BridalClass1-4ED_135.korean: 주인님께서 바르그 양과 밤을 지세우면 그 다음날은 꼬순내가ㅡ

BridalClass1-4ED_144.english: I feel the same way as Vanilla A1.

BridalClass1-4ED_16.korean: 천아… 아니, 예비 애기 엄마♥. 탈락이다.

BridalClass1-4ED_44.english: ...AA-7 Impet, that sounds like a really familiar way of speaking?

BridalClass1-4ED_48.english: Yeah, learn from Officer C-77 HongRyeon as an example, challenger. You'll grow more through today's elimination.
BridalClass1-4ED_48.korean: 그래, 홍련 작전관을 본보기로 배우도록 해, 도전자. 오늘의 탈락을 통해 더 성장할 거다.

BridalClass1-4ED_89.english: This challenger… is only Scissors Lise… the challenger.

BridalClass1-4ED_95.english: "Only Scissors Lise, challenger. Do you think this exam is the kind of competition anyone can pass just by showing off their pride?"
BridalClass1-4ED_95.korean:
오직 리제만 도전자님. 지금 이 시험이 자존심만 
내세운다고 아무나 통과할 수 있는 대회인 줄 아십니까?
